title: API Gateway Safe Restart Runbook
content:
API Gateway Safe Restart Runbook:

### Objective
Safely restart api-gateway instances in production to clear memory leaks, socket congestion, or stuck configurations without causing service disruption.

### Prerequisites
- Confirm traffic is routed to redundant nodes before doing any single node restart.
- Verify gateway status via curl -k https://api-gateway/health.

### Safe Restart Protocol
1. Target a single instance: api-gateway-pod-1 or api-gateway-pod-2.
2. Gracefully drain traffic from the target node:
   kubectl exec <pod_name> -- drain-connections.sh
3. Execute the restart command:
   kubectl rollout restart deployment api-gateway
4. Monitor traffic shifting and verify health check returns 200 OK after 30 seconds:
   curl -I https://api-gateway/health

### Rollback Plan
If health check fails, immediately route traffic back to the standby cluster and abort rollouts.
